claim_title: Pipeline shell runner executes only three Python stages

results.description: Verify shell runner wires seven stage invocations for the full pipeline.
results.command: calls=$(rg -n "python scripts/pipeline/" scripts/pipeline/run_complete_pipeline.sh | wc -l); steps=$(rg -n "^run_step(_no_dryrun_support)? [0-9]+ 7" scripts/pipeline/run_complete_pipeline.sh | wc -l); echo "PIPELINE_CALLS=$calls"; echo "STEP_CALLS=$steps"; if [ "$calls" -eq 7 ] && [ "$steps" -eq 7 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
